sections.label: Context & Background
sections.value: Series B SaaS, $20M ARR. Mobile is 38% of usage but 8% of new signups. Leadership wants mobile to be a parity surface, not a downgrade.

sections.label: Goals & Objectives
sections.value: Make mobile a real signup channel. Reduce mobile drop-off across the funnel. Match desktop activation rate within two quarters.

sections.label: Constraints & Considerations
sections.value: Mobile team is 4 engineers + 1 designer. No native rewrite — must work on React Native. Cannot break the existing desktop flow.
